name: 01 RSS to Obsidian Raw Inbox
description: Template workflow: RSS ingress -> route transcript candidates into 04, send text items through 00 -> 01a -> 03 pre-LLM dedupe, skip LLM for silent duplicates, run 02 -> 04a only when needed, then write Vault before deferred 03b index commit.
